highlights: Shasta shipped BSP 3.2.1 across both VPU platforms and merged 124 PRs — the most active team this week.
Jupiter optimized the Gretzky depth model pipeline with windowed disparity regression and curated stereo pseudo-GT improvements.
Infrastructure migrated core third-party dependencies (gRPC, protobuf, gtest, jsoncpp) to bzlmod, modernizing the build system.

teams.name: Shasta
teams.summary: Shasta shipped BSP 3.2.1 for VPU1 and VPU2, hardened diagnostic and camera firmware test suites, and improved raven upload reliability. Weed pressure logic was refined for variable-rate mode, and several Buildkite CI improvements landed.

teams.name: Jupiter
teams.summary: Jupiter advanced the Gretzky depth model with optimized disparity regression and curated stereo pseudo-GT pipelines. SDC recording was enhanced with MCAP compression and JQ triggering. Lidar extrinsic calibration and blind spot monitoring were improved.
